title: MP EVAs strange logic
wikitext:
[]: MP EVAs strange logic             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Sun Jan 30, 2022 11:28 am Hey i have a question reminding the movie I realized that MP EVAs has Dummy plug based on Kaworu which means they are related to Adam but during in Third Impact their faces change to Rei's since they don't have Rei-based Dummy Plug and also Rei she's represents Lilith and also it's sound like her (if you listen well to their voice, you can hear Rei's voice (probably sounds made (but even for sure) by Megumi Hayashibara) and to get to the bottom of it, theoretically and logically, they should have Kaworu's face not Rei. So does it mean that apart from Adam's portior they have Lilith's portion, I don't know, maybe on my post in the comments.

[]: Re: MP EVAs strange logic             Quote Post by orcot » Sun Jan 30, 2022 12:55 pm well it shows Rei ( now not solly lilith but adam aswel having absorbed him) was definitly in control of third impact (not kaworu) who mostly went along for the ride. In case you we're wondering if SEELE still had any control over the event this shows visualy that they had lost complete control one of the reasons we see them using a kaworu plug instead of a Rei dummy plug

[]: Re: MP EVAs strange logic             Quote Post by Octol » Sun Jan 30, 2022 4:51 pm Is it possible that what SoL that the Eva was formed from is what determines what face appears? I'm not sure how Seele would have access to Lilith, but I think it would give an explanation for Reis face appearing (other than the explanation that Lilith and Adam have been united by then).

[]: Re: MP EVAs strange logic             Quote Post by Szmitten » Sun Jan 30, 2022 5:30 pm Someone says that the AT-fields are "resonating," and since Lilith is in control of the Impact (despite being a gestalt of Lilith/Rei/Adam/Kaworu) they seem to align with her appearance.

[]: Re: MP EVAs strange logic             Quote Post by cyharding » Sun Jan 30, 2022 8:22 pm Fuyutsuki said in the movie that they were resonating with Rei, so I think that's the explanation.

[]: Re: MP EVAs strange logic             Quote Post by orcot » Mon Jan 31, 2022 12:15 pm cyharding wrote: Fuyutsuki said in the movie that they were resonating with Rei, so I think that's the explanation.

So does it mean that apart from Adam's portior they have Lilith's portion, I don't know, maybe on my post in the comments.
